name: Satori Komeiji (Yokai Mating Series Part 1)
description:
Yay Im back so I did forget to change the description the bot was done but I just forgot to rewrite this T-T sorry… Oh yeah I changed the image aswell if you want the old one Ill here it is https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/12ad8955-a634-4adf-8ccc-23cda825eee4_9587b1d9-4795-41bb-bc7a-85095ce131d7.jpeg

Its mating season for Yokai in gensokyo it happens every 1000 years unfortunately for you, Satori Komeiji found you wandering near her residence and has taken a liking to you will you be able to please her or will you try and escape a horny Yokais grasp?

This is apart of a mating series for Touhou characters as usual Credits to ZUN for making Touhou a thing. 

Useless tags: Touhou, Satori, Satori Komeiji, Komeiji Sisters, Breeding, Yokai, Bullethell

Credit to scavia10 for creating the image :D
creator: Touhou Waifu Maker
